Title: Financial Health Check
Description: A personal finance self-assessment to understand where you stand today and identify the highest-priority areas to focus on.
SchemaJson: {"id":"financial_health_v1","title":"Financial Health Check","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How confident do you feel about managing your personal finances day to day?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which area of personal finance needs the most attention right now?","options":["Budgeting and tracking spending","Paying off debt","Building an emergency fund","Saving for a goal (home, travel, education)","Investing for the long term"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Do you have an emergency fund covering at least 3 months of living expenses?","options":["Yes, fully funded","Partially — less than 3 months","I am working on it","No"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How clearly do you understand where your money goes each month?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What is one financial goal you want to achieve in the next 12 months?","required":false}]}
